text: Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Showers will become more frequent later. Force 5 to 6 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 6 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
